description_long: This is a large, L-shaped wooden cabinet and desk combination, featuring a tall shelving unit with three open shelves above a marble-textured countertop. Below the countertop, there are three drawers and a cabinet door, all with metallic handles, providing ample storage space. The desk portion extends perpendicularly from the main cabinet, offering a spacious work surface with a small circular cable management hole. The wood grain is rich and dark, giving the piece a sophisticated and sturdy appearance, while the marble section adds a touch of elegance. The back and sides are fully enclosed with wood panels, and the overall construction appears robust and well-crafted. This unit is suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or reception areas.
description: A large, L-shaped wooden cabinet and desk unit with open shelves, drawers, a marble-textured countertop, and metallic handles. The design is robust and elegant, suitable for urban office or reception settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelves, marble-textured countertop, drawers, and a cabinet door with metallic handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the shelving unit and the marble-textured section, with wood paneling visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the full wood panel backing and the L-shaped desk extension.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thickness of the wood panels and the marble-textured countertop edge.
